headline: Fed Minutes, Home Sales, Pepsi, Delta, and More to Watch This Week
summary: In a quiet week following America’s big birthday bash, we’ll also see data on service-sector activity and the trade deficit. Next week promises to be busier, with big banks kicking off earnings season.
